title: Felanil Baaks

{{Quote|Greetings, Padawans. Greetings, Knights. Greetings, Masters Lanius and Devan. I am called Felanil Baaks. I am a crafter of lightsabers.|Felanil Baaks|<ref name="FBJA" />}}
'''Felanil Baaks''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the last [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. A rarity within the Order, Baaks was considered an [[Jedi artisan/Legends|artisan]] of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|As for Baaks, he's one of the most engaging individuals I've ever spoken with, and he knows more about lightsaber construction, history, and theory than anyone in the galaxy, I'd say. We're happier to have him on Almas than I can possibly convey.|[[Lanius Qel-Bertuk]]|<ref name="Further Conversations with Lanius">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/livingforce/swlf20040916|text=Further Conversations with Lanius}}</ref>}}
Like most Jedi of the era, Baaks was discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] on his homeworld of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] and turned over to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] at a young age. Traveling to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Baaks entered the [[Jedi academy|academy]] and received [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] lessons from [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]. During training sessions with his [[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clan]], Baaks was told by Yoda that he was a fine practitioner of "[[Form Zero/Legends|Form Zero]]," that is, lightsaber combat that doesn't involve lighting the weapon. While not exceptional with a lightsaber, Baaks [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduated]] from the academy and was selected by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. After years of training one-on-one, Baaks succeeded in passing the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|elevated]] to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="FBJA" />

As a Knight of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Jedi Baaks chose to pursue further learning through his study as a [[Jedi Consular]]. Selecting a rare field of study, Baaks became one of a handful of [[Jedi artisan/Legends|artisans]] present in the Order. Focusing his work on the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], Baaks was different from other Jedi in that he focused the Force through creativity rather than the arts of diplomacy or [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]]. While he refused to take on a proper Padawan, Baaks often took older Padawans or Knights aside to teach them accelerated lightsaber construction classes in order to perfect the lightsaber they had already constructed. As typical of an artisan, Baaks gave several of his lightsabers as gifts to other Jedi in the Order, including [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]. Master Windu in turn handed the lightsaber over to an apprentice studying at the [[Almas Academy]] in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]].<ref name="FBJA" />

Baaks traveled to [[Almas]] himself shortly thereafter in hopes of taking on five students to train as artisans. Refusing to take any Padawans, Baaks selected five Knights who already had their own lightsabers in hopes that they could enhance their tools and continue to craft more. While Baaks was on Almas, the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] recalled all Jedi to Coruscant to receive placement within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Like many Jedi in the Cularin system, Baaks invoked the [[Right of Denial]], an act that was not accepted by the [[Office of the Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Office of the Supreme Chancellor]]. [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] declared martial law in the Cularin system in retaliation against the disobedient Jedi, forcing all Jedi refusing to accept orders from the High Council to turn over their lightsabers if they wished to remain within the Order. Doing so, Baaks illegally re-equipped many of the Jedi there by constructing several new weapons.<ref name="FBJA" />
